---
title: "The Wynnes, or, Many Men, Many Minds: A Tale of Every-Day Life"
---

## The Wynnes, or, Many Men, Many Minds: A Tale of Every-Day Life

**Author:** Ann Maria Carter Smith
**Date:** 1861
**Imprint:** London: Masters

### Notes

Originally published as a serial in the <i>Churchman\'s Companion</i>.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
